name: Guangdong Xinhui Meida Nylon Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Xinhui Meida Nylon Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of nylon products in China. It offers nylon-6 chips and composite materials, multi-filaments, texturing yarns, polyamide and nylon fibers, and chemical knitting fabrics. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Jiangmen, China.
